feed.title: futurism — Savva Pistolas
feed.subtitle: Writing about AI, alignment, systems thinking, cybersecurity, futurism, privacy, and more.

entry.title: AI as a detector of work that needn't be
entry.summary: Can AI serve as our quiet advocate for rooting out poorly designed systems that sideline human experience in favour of performative artefacts that allude to productivity?

entry.title: Wage slaves: the Neo way
Pointing at the mushrooms - Identifying our own digital colonisation
entry.summary: A chat about digital advertising and fungus
